title: tpm — generate_a_weekly_exec_review_pptx_for_the_26ai_project_from — v1
description: Synthesized by skill_builder for persona=tpm, kb=generate_a_weekly_exec_review_pptx_for_the_26ai_project_from. Refine before promoting.

project_name.description: Extract the project/program name as written in the header/title area (e.g., "26ai"). Output only the name, without extra qualifiers unless they are part of the official title.

overall_rag.description: Extract the overall status as a single value: "Green", "Amber", or "Red" (or the exact equivalent used). If the artifact uses an icon/color only, map it to the corresponding word.

executive_summary.description: Extract the executive summary narrative intended for leadership; keep it dense but readable as 2–5 sentences or a compact paragraph. Preserve key facts (what changed this week, why it matters, and the headline risks/asks) without adding interpretation.

key_accomplishments.description: Extract the list of completed highlights for the week as short bullet strings (each starting with an action verb where possible). Include measurable outcomes, shipped items, decisions, or closed risks; omit plans and future work.

upcoming_milestones.description: Extract the next milestones as bullet strings including milestone name and target date (or week) when available. If a milestone is slipping, include the updated date and note the slip succinctly.

schedule_health.description: Extract the schedule RAG ("Green"/"Amber"/"Red") and a 1–2 sentence justification referencing specific milestone dates, slips, or critical path issues. If only narrative is present, infer the RAG only when explicitly stated; otherwise return the narrative without inventing a color.

scope_health.description: Extract the scope RAG ("Green"/"Amber"/"Red") and a 1–2 sentence justification citing scope changes, churn, additions/removals, or definition gaps. Keep it factual and tied to named deliverables or requirements.

resource_health.description: Extract the resourcing RAG ("Green"/"Amber"/"Red") and a 1–2 sentence justification citing staffing levels, key role gaps, attrition, or bandwidth constraints. Include any quantified shortfall (e.g., "-2 FTE") if present.

top_risks.description: Extract the top risks as bullet strings; each entry should include the risk statement and, if present, impact/likelihood and mitigation/owner. Keep each risk to one compact line; do not merge distinct risks.

metrics_snapshot.description: Extract the metrics snapshot as a list of "Metric: value (trend/target)" strings, preserving units and time window (e.g., WoW, QoQ). Include only metrics actually shown; do not compute derived values.

workstream_status.description: Extract per-workstream status lines as bullet strings in the format "Workstream — RAG — 1 short sentence update" (include owner if present). Keep each workstream separate and preserve the stated RAG and key callouts.
